title: S4nity's Horror modpack
description: A fairly minimal, vanilla like styled Minecraft modpack for horror fanatics.
body:
This modpack includes a few mods that should make your game absolutely **horrifying**. You won't experience everything straight away because it takes time, and it can actually be rather peaceful sometimes while it lasts, but then when you start experiencing strange things and something starts to notice you, you won't be having such a good time at all. This modpacks adds a few performance mods to allow server sided and client sided mods to work also just putting this out there!

**main goal**..**Kill herobrine**
